raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"statement","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"radio personalities bring a unique and personal touch to the media and can have a strong impact on their audience.","distilled_fact":"Radio personalities bring a unique and personal touch to the media and can have a strong impact on their audience."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"statement","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"radio personalities often use their unique personalities and perspectives to connect with listeners, build relationships, and deliver entertaining and informative content.","distilled_fact":"Radio personalities often use their unique personalities and perspectives to connect with listeners, build relationships, and deliver entertaining and informative content."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"statement","confidence":0.82,"matched_text":"some listeners may enjoy the comedic stylings of radio personalities like howard stern or ryan seacrest, while others may appreciate the political commentary of hosts like rush limbaugh or rachel maddow.","distilled_fact":"Some listeners may enjoy the comedic stylings of radio personalities like Howard Stern or Ryan Seacrest, while others may appreciate the political commentary of hosts like Rush Limbaugh or Rachel Maddow."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"statement","confidence":0.77,"matched_text":"ultimately, it is up to each listener to find the radio personalities that resonate with them personally and whose content they enjoy.","distilled_fact":"It is up to each listener to find the radio personalities that resonate with them personally and whose content they enjoy."}]}
